name: \'Bathroom.'/ (FART & POSSIBLE SCAT)
description:
So, to make a long story short, I got heavily inspired by > this guy! Go check their bots out they're amazing at their work fr fr

And so..this bot was made! Whether you wanna coat the entire place in your shit or use it like an actual normal person is up to you! This is gonna be a series where instead of making a giant ass home instantly, I split the rooms into their own bots BEFORE I do that, just to test the waters and see what room settings yall like, but ofc bathroom first cause I'm a freaky mf >:D

(go check out hit song called all the things she said fr fr) also this bot was originally gonna be private but tbh we need more bathroom bots in this website soo..yeah!

(one more also, sorry for the short starting msg, you can't really make walking into a bathroom more better, so uh..yeah.)
